description_long: This is a rectangular book with a vibrant, pixelated cover illustration featuring a blonde-haired character holding a white animal, surrounded by blue and white decorative elements on a green background. The front cover is visually busy, with a retro, low-resolution art style reminiscent of early video game graphics. The back cover is plain, composed of beige and tan blocks arranged in a brick-like pattern, lacking any text or imagery. The book's spine is very thin and appears to be a continuation of the cover's color palette, with no visible text or decorative elements. The object is of standard book thickness, suggesting it contains multiple pages. The overall appearance is playful and eye-catching, likely appealing to a younger audience or fans of pixel art.
description: A rectangular book with a pixelated, colorful cover illustration and a plain, block-patterned back. The spine is thin and unadorned.
description_view_0: The front view shows a green cover with a pixel art illustration of a blonde character and a white animal, surrounded by blue and white accents.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the book's thin spine, with a pale yellowish color and no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: The back view displays a plain, beige block-patterned surface with no imagery or text.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the thin, pale spine, mirroring the other side.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a pixel art illustration of a blonde-haired character holding a white animal, surrounded by stylized blue and white elements. The artwork is rendered in a retro, blocky style with a playful and colorful palette. The background is predominantly green, enhancing the vibrant, whimsical feel.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is very thin, pale yellowish, and lacks any visible text or decorative elements. It appears plain and unadorned.
